text: Hi. My name is Claire and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance and we want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure we're finding you the right quote. May I ask, are you under the age of 80? Yes. Great. I will now transfer you to a specialist to discuss your premium savings options.
